message:
feat(health): Implement worker health monitoring with heartbeats

Add rchd/src/health.rs with:
- HealthConfig: configurable check interval, timeout, thresholds
- HealthCheckResult: success/failure tracking with response time
- WorkerHealth: per-worker state with consecutive failure counting
- HealthMonitor: background task checking all workers periodically

Health checks:
- SSH connect + echo command to verify worker availability
- Track response time for degraded detection (>5s threshold)
- Mark unreachable after 3 consecutive failures
- Update worker pool status for selection algorithm

Integrated into rchd main.rs with automatic startup.
All 19 rchd tests pass, clippy clean.

Closes: remote_compilation_helper-eyd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
